title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_reset_soft
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_reset_soft' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

allWorkspaceRoots.description: Fan out across all MCP file roots.

ref.description: Commit to reset to. Accepts ancestor notation (`HEAD~1`, `HEAD~3`), branch names, or full SHAs.
